sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25809" key="diashmasi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διασημ-ᾰσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n25809.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">method of marking,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.4</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.3</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
